name: arxiv-saas-generator
description: arXiv SaaS Generator - Full Stack Application

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "DB,BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:db" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:db: docker-compose up -d && echo 'Database started on port 5432'
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
